task: Implement a JavaScript function `echo(value)` that returns its single argument unchanged. Whatever is passed in is returned exactly as-is: same number, same string, same boolean, same null, the same array or object reference. Do not copy, clone, coerce, stringify, or wrap the value; do not add defaults; do not special-case any input. This is a trivial smoke/identity fixture: its job is to confirm the harness, extraction, and dispatch path work end-to-end, NOT to separate models. It is intentionally a demote-class fixture and is expected to saturate.
visibleSpec: echo(value) -> value. Returns the exact argument it was given, with no transformation of any kind.
scope: Single pure function. No mutation of the argument, no extra parameters, no helper globals, no I/O, no cloning.
